build.description: Default build agent with full tool access for Alphonso development

plan.description: Read-only planning and analysis for Alphonso architecture decisions

audit.description: Deep read-only audit of Alphonso components, services, connectors, and truth labels

security.description: Security review of CSP, secrets, permissions, connector gating, and Tauri capabilities

release.description: Release gatekeeper — validates readiness before any version promotion

connector-verifier.description: Verifies connector implementations are real, not stubs — checks policy gating and proof paths

test-analyst.description: Analyzes test coverage gaps, identifies untested services and components

doc-maintainer.description: Checks documentation freshness against actual code — finds stale counts, missing sections, outdated claims
